title: Oldest Evangelion Skits
wikitext:
[]: Oldest Evangelion Skits             Quote Post by Dummy2837 » Wed Apr 03, 2024 2:08 pm Good afternoon! I've been scouring the web recently and came across 3 very old Evangelion-related skits from Anime Expo 1998. I've not seen any mention of these online, and I do not believe they are uploaded anywhere. Due to this, I've saved them on my Google Drive and will link them now for your viewing pleasure . I thought the Rei and Asuka one was quite funny, but lemme know what you think! Video 1: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gc1kQN ... drive_link Video 2: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LxgYqp ... drive_link Video 3: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1oWbPI5 ... drive_link

[]: Re: Oldest Evangelion Skits             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Apr 03, 2024 11:25 pm Those are a cool find, though I wonder if there's anything from 96 or 97. Man, they're so... evageeky.

[]: Re: Oldest Evangelion Skits             Quote Post by Dummy2837 » Thu Apr 04, 2024 1:50 am FelipeFritschF wrote: Those are a cool find, though I wonder if there's anything from 96 or 97. Man, they're so... evageeky.

Article: Oldest Evangelion Skits
[]: Oldest Evangelion Skits             Quote Post by Dummy2837 » Wed Apr 03, 2024 2:08 pm Good afternoon! I've been scouring the web recently and came across 3 very old Evangelion-related skits from Anime Expo 1998. I've not seen any mention of these online, and I do not believe they are uploaded anywhere. Due to this, I've saved them on my Google Drive and will link them now for your viewing pleasure . I thought the Rei and Asuka one was quite funny, but lemme know what you think! Video 1: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gc1kQN ... drive_link Video 2: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LxgYqp ... drive_link Video 3: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1oWbPI5 ... drive_link

[]: Re: Oldest Evangelion Skits             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Apr 03, 2024 11:25 pm Those are a cool find, though I wonder if there's anything from 96 or 97. Man, they're so... evageeky.
